title: The Sun Mod
description: This mod adds some sun-related items to Minecraft!
body:
This mod adds some sun-related items to Minecraft! You get them by trading with a Sunologer, which you get by putting a Block Of Lava (crafted with a lava bucket) in front of a villager.


- When the Sun Healer is in you inventory, you get infinite Regeneration 2.
- When the Medal Of Noon is in your inventory when it is noon, your armor bar fills up and your attack damage (with your fist) goes to 10.
- When the Sunset Cloak is in your inventory by dusk or dawn, you get speed 2 and slow falling.
- When you right-click the Sunkeeper's Hourglass when it is dusk, nighttime, or dawn, the time will set to noon, and you will get speed and haste 3 for 3 minutes.
- When you right-click the Emberheart Pendant when you are standing in lava of fire, you get fire resistance for 30 seconds, and regeneration 3 for 1 second.
- When you right-click the Jar Of Summer, the weather clears.
- When you right-click the Eye Of The Sun, all entities in a 20-block radius (not including yourself) glow for 30 seconds.
- When you right-click the Solar Comet, you get teleported 7 blocks forward.
- When you right-click the Wand Of The Zenith, all entities (not including yourself) in a 6-block radius get slowness 3 for 30 seconds.
- When you right-click the Crystals Of Dried Sunlight, there is a big explosion (that doesn't hurt you) and you get speed and resistance 2 for 3 minutes and all other entities get blindness 2 for 3 minutes.
- When you right-click the Core Of Dawnfire, you get strength and haste 1 for 5 minutes and the Core disappers after a while.
- When you right-click the Sunblessed Bedroll when it is noon, the game sets your spawnpint where you right-clicked it, and you get luck and haste 1 for 10 minutes.
- When you right-click the Daymaker Charm, you get speed and haste 2 for a minute, and time goes forward by a lot.
- See for yourself what the Eternal Sunstone does!
